steps.title: Complete the relative clause
steps.content: The relative clause begins with "whose body of work" and needs a finite verb before the adjective "interdisciplinary." Without a finite verb, the clause has no complete predicate.

steps.title: Choose the finite verb
steps.content: Choice A uses an infinitive, choice C uses a participial phrase, and choice D uses a present participle. None can function as the main verb of the relative clause. The remaining choice supplies the finite verb after "work." The answer is B.
